evidence_index.verbatim_quote: On July 15, 2005, Dr. Hrynkiw, a neurosurgeon, performed fusion surgery on Thomas’s spine to relieve pain in his lower back and pain and numbness in his right leg and foot caused by a herniated disk.
evidence_index.summary: Dr. Hrynkiw performed spine fusion surgery on Thomas to relieve pain and numbness.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Immediately following the surgery, Thomas experienced weakness, numbness, and pain in his lower extremities, along with numbness in his perineal area and urinary and fecal incontinence.
evidence_index.summary: Post-surgery, Thomas experienced symptoms of CES including weakness and incontinence.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: On July 25, 2005, Dr. Hrynkiw performed a second surgery on Thomas’s spine. The second surgery provided Thomas no relief, and he is permanently partially disabled.
evidence_index.summary: A second surgery was performed but did not relieve Thomas's symptoms.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: The jury found in favor of the Trammells, awarding compensatory damages of $1,650,000 to Thomas and $500,000 to Barbara.
evidence_index.summary: Jury awarded damages to Thomas and Barbara Trammell.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Dr. Hash opined that Dr. Hrynkiw violated the standard of care in performing the first surgery.
evidence_index.summary: Dr. Hash testified that Dr. Hrynkiw violated the standard of care.
evidence_index.speaker: Dr. Hash

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: We hold that the Trammells presented sufficient evidence of Dr. Hrynkiw’s failure to adhere to the standard of care applicable to postoperative treatment of CES.
evidence_index.summary: Court found sufficient evidence of failure in postoperative care.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Accordingly, we affirm the judgment of the trial court.
evidence_index.summary: Judgment of the trial court affirmed.
evidence_index.speaker: Court conclusion

verdict_detected.key_phrase: The jury found in favor of the Trammells, awarding compensatory damages
